File: /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260604T185102/node-remediation-console/source/src/components/editor/formView/unhealthyConditionsField/CustomTypeModal.tsx

Apply ALL of the following 2 fixes to this file:

### Fix 1
Line: 41
Rule [family:Modal]:
## Modal Family Migration

Target structure (correct v6 composition):
```jsx
  <Modal appendTo={...} backdropClassName={...} disableFocusTrap={...} elementToFocus={...} id={...} isOpen={...} maxWidth={...} onClose={...}>
    <ModalBody role={...} />
    <ModalHeader description={...} descriptorId={...} help={...} labelId={...} title={...} titleIconVariant={...} titleScreenReaderText={...} />
    <ModalFooter />
  </Modal>
```

Props that stay on <Modal>: appendTo, backdropClassName, disableFocusTrap, elementToFocus, id, isOpen, maxWidth, onClose, onEscapePress, ouiaId, ouiaSafe, position, positionOffset, variant, width

Props that move to child components:
  description -> <ModalHeader />
  help -> <ModalHeader />
  title -> <ModalHeader />
  titleIconVariant -> <ModalHeader />

Removed props (move to child component as children or remove):
  actions -> map to appropriate child component (any)
  bodyAriaLabel -> ModalBody (as children, string)
  bodyAriaRole -> ModalBody (as children, string)
  footer -> ModalFooter (as children, ReactNode)
  hasNoBodyWrapper -> map to appropriate child component (boolean)
  header -> ModalHeader (as children, ReactNode)
  showClose -> map to appropriate child component (boolean)
  titleLabel -> map to appropriate child component (string)

Removed children (no longer valid JSX): ModalBoxCloseButton, ModalContent, ModalBox, ModalBoxBody, ModalBoxHeader, ModalBoxFooter

Add imports: ModalBody, ModalHeader, ModalFooter from '@patternfly/react-core'

Remove imports (if no longer used): ModalBoxCloseButton, ModalContent, ModalBox, ModalBoxBody, ModalBoxHeader, ModalBoxFooter

  Old import: @patternfly/react-core
  New import: @patternfly/react-core

New props on replacement:

Removed props (no replacement equivalent): actions, bodyAriaLabel, bodyAriaRole, description, footer, hasNoBodyWrapper, header, help, showClose, title, titleIconVariant, titleLabel


### Fix 2
Line: 78
Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-helpertextitem]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <HelperTextItem> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <HelperTextItem> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <HelperTextItem variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></HelperTextItem>
  After:  <HelperTextItem variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <HelperTextItem> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <HelperTextItem><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</HelperTextItem>
  After:  <HelperTextItem icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</HelperTextItem>

Incident context:
  componentName: HelperTextItem
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  parentFrom: @patternfly/react-core
  parentName: HelperText

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted
Component: HelperTextItem
Prop: icon

Code context:
```
   77              <HelperText>
   78                <HelperTextItem>{t("Name of the custom type")}</HelperTextItem>
   79              </HelperText>

```

Instructions:
1. Read the file at /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260604T185102/node-remediation-console/source/src/components/editor/formView/unhealthyConditionsField/CustomTypeModal.tsx
2. Process each fix INDEPENDENTLY in sequence. For each fix:
   a. Identify the exact code affected (line number and affected element)
   b. Determine the specific change needed (add/remove/rename identifiers, update references)
   c. Track all changes for the final write
3. Make the minimum edits necessary — do not change unrelated code, but DO clean up any artifacts caused by your changes (e.g., remove imports that are no longer referenced, delete dead declarations)
4. After determining your changes, reason through any functional side effects: verify that your edits preserve the existing behavior of the surrounding code. If a migration change makes existing variables, state, or logic redundant, clean up the affected code so the file remains correct and consistent.
5. Do NOT revert any changes that were already applied in previous passes
6. Write the fixed file once with ALL changes from every fix applied
7. REQUIRED: If companion test files are listed above, read EACH one now. Do NOT skip this step. For each test file, check whether your changes to the main file would cause test failures (e.g., portal rendering means getByText/getByRole won't find dropdown content, renamed attributes break selectors). If a test would break, apply the fix and write the updated test file.


Before writing, reason through each fix step by step to ensure nothing is missed. Then read the file, make the edits, and write it.

After writing the file, produce a '## Changes Applied' section that lists each change you made, each fix that was already applied (no change needed), and each fix you could not apply (with a brief reason). This summary is used by subsequent processing steps.
I'll start by reading the file to understand the current code.

Now let me analyze both fixes:

**Fix 1 - Modal Family Migration (line 41):**
- Remove `title` prop from `<Modal>` → move to `<ModalHeader title={...} />`
- Remove `actions` prop from `<Modal>` → move content to `<ModalFooter>`
- Wrap existing children (`<Form>`) in `<ModalBody>`
- Add imports for `ModalBody`, `ModalHeader`, `ModalFooter`

**Fix 2 - HelperTextItem icon (line 78):**
- Looking at line 78: `<HelperTextItem>{t("Name of the custom type")}</HelperTextItem>`
- This contains only text, no icon. The rule says to move icons to the `icon` prop. Since there's no icon here, no change is needed for this fix.

Let me apply Fix 1:

arguments.after:
import {
  Button,
  Form,
  FormGroup,
  FormHelperText,
  HelperText,
  HelperTextItem,
  Modal,
  ModalBody,
  ModalFooter,
  ModalHeader,
  ModalVariant,
  TextInput,
} from "@patternfly/react-core";
arguments.before:
import {
  Button,
  Form,
  FormGroup,
  FormHelperText,
  HelperText,
  HelperTextItem,
  Modal,
  ModalVariant,
  TextInput,
} from "@patternfly/react-core";

arguments.after:
<Modal
      isOpen={isOpen}
      onClose={onClose}
      variant={ModalVariant.small}
      data-test="use-custom-type-modal"
    >
      <ModalHeader title={t("Use custom type")} />
      <ModalBody>
        <Form>
          <FormGroup fieldId="custom-type" isRequired label={t("Type")}>
            <TextInput
              name={fieldName}
              value={customType}
              onChange={(_, value) => setCustomType(value)}
              data-test="custom-type-input"
              aria-label="custom type"
            />
            <FormHelperText>
              <HelperText>
                <HelperTextItem>{t("Name of the custom type")}</HelperTextItem>
              </HelperText>
            </FormHelperText>
          </FormGroup>
        </Form>
      </ModalBody>
      <ModalFooter>
        <Button
          key="confirm"
          variant="primary"
          onClick={() => {
            setValue(customType);
            onClose();
          }}
          isDisabled={!customType}
          data-test="confirm-custom-type"
          type="submit"
        >
          {t("Create")}
        </Button>
        <Button
          key="cancel"
          variant="link"
          onClick={onClose}
          data-test="cancel-custom-type"
        >
          {t("Cancel")}
        </Button>
      </ModalFooter>
    </Modal>
arguments.before:
<Modal
      isOpen={isOpen}
      onClose={onClose}
      variant={ModalVariant.small}
      title={t("Use custom type")}
      data-test="use-custom-type-modal"
      actions={[
        <Button
          key="confirm"
          variant="primary"
          onClick={() => {
            setValue(customType);
            onClose();
          }}
          isDisabled={!customType}
          data-test="confirm-custom-type"
          type="submit"
        >
          {t("Create")}
        </Button>,
        <Button
          key="cancel"
          variant="link"
          onClick={onClose}
          data-test="cancel-custom-type"
        >
          {t("Cancel")}
        </Button>,
      ]}
    >
      <Form>
        <FormGroup fieldId="custom-type" isRequired label={t("Type")}>
          <TextInput
            name={fieldName}
            value={customType}
            onChange={(_, value) => setCustomType(value)}
            data-test="custom-type-input"

          <FormHelperText>
            <HelperText>
              <HelperTextItem>{t("Name of the custom type")}</HelperTextItem>
            </HelperText>
          </FormHelperText>
        </FormGroup>
      </Form>
    </Modal>

content.text: Now let me verify the final file:
The file looks correct. Let me verify there are no companion test files:

No companion test files found. The file is complete and correct.

## Changes Applied

### Fix 1 — Modal Family Migration (line 41) ✅ Applied
- **Removed** `title` prop from `<Modal>` and moved it to a new `<ModalHeader title={t("Use custom type")} />` child component.
- **Removed** `actions` prop from `<Modal>` and moved the two `<Button>` elements into a new `<ModalFooter>` child component (removed the array wrapper `[...]` and trailing commas since they are now direct JSX children).
- **Wrapped** existing `<Form>` children in a new `<ModalBody>` component.
- **Added imports** for `ModalBody`, `ModalFooter`, and `ModalHeader` from `@patternfly/react-core`.

### Fix 2 — HelperTextItem icon-to-prop migration (line 78) ⚠️ No change needed
- The `<HelperTextItem>` at the relevant line contains only text content (`{t("Name of the custom type")}`), not an icon. The rule specifically applies when an icon element from `@patternfly/react-icons` is present as a child. Since there is no icon child, no migration is required.

chunks.response:
No companion test files found. The file is complete and correct.

## Changes Applied

### Fix 1 — Modal Family Migration (line 41) ✅ Applied
- **Removed** `title` prop from `<Modal>` and moved it to a new `<ModalHeader title={t("Use custom type")} />` child component.
- **Removed** `actions` prop from `<Modal>` and moved the two `<Button>` elements into a new `<ModalFooter>` child component (removed the array wrapper `[...]` and trailing commas since they are now direct JSX children).
- **Wrapped** existing `<Form>` children in a new `<ModalBody>` component.
- **Added imports** for `ModalBody`, `ModalFooter`, and `ModalHeader` from `@patternfly/react-core`.

### Fix 2 — HelperTextItem icon-to-prop migration (line 78) ⚠️ No change needed
- The `<HelperTextItem>` at the relevant line contains only text content (`{t("Name of the custom type")}`), not an icon. The rule specifically applies when an icon element from `@patternfly/react-icons` is present as a child. Since there is no icon child, no migration is required.
